verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Make me broken So I can be healed ‘Cause I’m so calloused And now I can’t feel I want to run to You With heart wide open Make me broken

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Make empty So I can be filled ‘Cause I’m still holding Onto my will And I’m completed When you are with me Make me empty

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: ‘Til You are my one desire ‘Til You are my one true love ‘Til You are my breath, my everything Lord, please keep making me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Make me lonely So I can be Yours ‘Til I want no one More than You, Lord ‘Cause in the darkness I know You will hold me Make me lonely
